examples: Sweet wormwood is a common plant in China and Tu Youyou is the woman who used the special power of the plant to save millions of lives.
But her end is bitter as wormwood, sharp as a two-edged sword.
He hath filled me with bitterness, he hath made me drunken with wormwood.
Wormwood (the fabulous Gabriel Ebert and Lesli Margherita), who ostracize her, because she reads books.
The prisons are Belmarsh, Brixton, Coldingley, Feltham, High Down, Pentonville, Wandsworth and Wormwood Scrubs.
